subcodes.title: Words to Mr and Mrs Hannen, spoken on 1909-02-22
subcodes.first_line: This refers to the great disturbance which is to occur in that day--the latter day. That those souls who occupy the highest stations shall be reverted to the lowest
subcodes.subjects: @false claims to divine revelation or spiritual stations, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @power of the Manifestation of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Christian doctrine and practice, @Mary Magdalene, @Saint Peter and Saint Paul
